message:
✨ Add shoppable links to tank-mate compatibility section (#13)

Make compatible species rows clickable — links to product page if the
species is in the store, or to a search query otherwise. Add a
"Shop Compatible Tank-Mates" section with top 4 product cards
(images, prices, badges) for easy purchasing.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
